title: Cauldron API
description: this mod is an api that allows mod creators to create multiple type of recipe that base on cauldron!
body:
this mod provides a api
allows mod developers to make cauldron recipes
with the feature of 
- living entities
- items dropping inside cauldron 
- specific block sets

if all of the rule is all matched
then right-click the cauldron to make things out!
